title: glinus mollugo
intro: Glinus mollugo, also known as sandspurry or white spurry, is a perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Glinus mollugo include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
